tasks.name: implement-refactor-tsParser
tasks.task:
target_path: src/infrastructures/tsParser.ts

Pre-diagnosed violations (no-shaping rule):
- parseFunctions, countStructure, collectImportedNames, makeReferencedImportsIn, collectStandaloneFunctions, collectVariableFunctions, collectClassMethods: AST→RawFunctionInfo shaping — move to src/repositories/parsers/tsParser.ts
- extractTestFunctions: string parsing of test file content — move to src/repositories/parsers/tsParser.ts
- detectFramework: reads package.json and returns TestFramework domain type — move to src/repositories/parsers/tsParser.ts
- findTestFile + searchDir: pure FS traversal — keep in src/infrastructures/tsParser.ts

Known callers: src/repositories/testStrategyRepository.ts imports parseFunctions, findTestFile, extractTestFunctions, detectFramework — update its imports after the move.

tasks.name: commit-refactor-tsParser
tasks.task: Refactor complete and build passes. Commit the changes with an appropriate conventional commit message (e.g. refactor(infra): move tsParser shaping logic to repositories/parsers/).
